seoTitle: Allendale East vs Alma — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Allendale East and Alma. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Allendale East vs Alma: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Allendale East and Alma.
heading: Allendale East vs Alma — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Allendale East, South Australia and Alma, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Allendale East has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Alma (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Allendale East or Alma safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Allendale East has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Alma scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Allendale East scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Alma scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Allendale East or Alma?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Allendale East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
